task: Verify renewal fee from franchise agreement
finding: Franchise Agreement Section 4(e) (page 62) states: 'You pay RYTECH a renewal fee of 15% of the then current initial franchise fee.' This matches the Item 6 fee table and Item 17 table. Note 7 stating '10%' is an error in the FDD footnote.
resolution: Renewal fee is 15% of then-current initial franchise fee. Note 7 contains a typographical error.

canonical_update.note: Confirmed from FA Section 4(e). Note 7 error resolved.
